summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Accounting Copilot SaaS MVP. Backend APIs mostly functional with 8/9 tests passing. Frontend UI and navigation working well with 7/8 tests passing. Core authentication, tenant management, dashboard, and billing plan display all working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 520 server error when creating subscription
flaky_endpoints.impact: Users cannot subscribe to billing plans

integration_issues.issue: Subscribe buttons not found during testing - possible session expiry or selector issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix subscription creation endpoint (/api/billing/subscribe) that returns 520 error. Investigate Stripe integration timeout or server configuration issue. Add proper data-testid attributes to subscribe buttons for better testability.
